title: gilia ophthalmoides
intro: Gilia ophthalmoides is a flowering plant species belonging to the Polemoniaceae family, commonly known as the gilia or globe mallow. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Gilia ophthalmoides include its potential to treat eye and ear infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Gilia ophthalmoides include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
